may be the only published study of applying FFMs on

concepts.finding:
To further demonstrate the
eﬀectiveness of FFMs on CTR prediction, we present the
use of FFM as our major model to win two world-wide
CTR competitions hosted by Criteo and Avazu.

concepts.finding:
We demonstrate that for certain kinds of data sets, FFMs
outperform three well-known models, LM, Poly2, and FM,
in terms of logloss, with a cost of longer training time.
